personal.name: Yulius Giann
personal.title: Software Developer
personal.bio: 9 years+ building Vue and Nuxt frontends, Go backends, Laravel full-stack applications, and scalable cloud systems — Redis-optimized APIs, event-driven architecture, and Google Cloud Functions. Based in Jakarta, available remotely.

projects.title: Rentalnow.id
projects.description: Motorcycle rental marketplace for fleet owners and customers across Jakarta.
projects.problem: Rental operators managed fleet and bookings through WhatsApp and paper records — no real-time visibility into availability or maintenance schedules.
projects.outcome: Live platform at rentalnow.id — operators track fleet, orders, and bookings from one dashboard with maintenance scheduling, availability blocking, and calendar integration.

projects.title: Prophack Japan
projects.description: Japan Properties website with property listings, search filters, and contact forms for inquiries. Also user can set its preferences for property and search for properties that match the preferences.
projects.problem: Property listings and inquiries were managed manually via spreadsheets and email, causing slow response times and missed leads.
projects.outcome: Centralized platform with dynamic listings, search filters, and a preferences-based matching feature — inquiries now flow directly through the site.

projects.title: HappyNest School
projects.description: A school website with information about the school, programs, and contact forms for inquiries with CMS for easy content management.
projects.problem: The school's static site had limited program info and no easy way for prospective parents to inquire or learn about enrollment.
projects.outcome: Modern site with full program details, a CMS for the school team to update content independently, and inquiry forms for prospective families.

experience.description: Lead a team of 4 software developers building and maintaining web applications for one of Indonesia's largest newspapers. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software under tight editorial deadlines.
achievements: Designed and maintained a static content delivery strategy for web and mobile homepages, significantly improving first-time load performance
Designed Add-on Subscription service to enable seamless subscription management and payment processing for digital content access
Enabled tokenization for recurring membership payments, allowing users to securely store payment information for future transactions
Optimized Redis caching for the Articles API to reduce database load, prevent race conditions, and ensure timely reflection of editorial updates
Architected and integrated Google Cloud Functions into the Articles backend to enhance service scalability and streamline inter-service communication
Led frontend modernization of the payment service, migrating from Laravel templates to a fully component-based Vue.js architecture
Implemented event-driven architecture and background job processing in the payment service, reducing deployment overhead and enabling seamless external service integrations
Fostered agile development through regular 1-on-1s, team mentoring, and managing user story prioritization aligned to business goals

experience.description: Frontend developer responsible for building and maintaining user-facing web applications and platforms for kompas.id.
achievements: Translated UI/UX designs into WordPress themes using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP
Migrated existing WordPress layouts and functionality to Nuxt.js (Vue.js SSR) with Tailwind CSS, ensuring feature parity and measurable performance improvements
Improved site maintainability, scalability, and load times through frontend tooling and optimization techniques

experience.description: Developed and maintained web applications for Jurnal.id, an accounting SaaS platform used by businesses across Indonesia.
achievements: Built RESTful APIs and created the company's first open API with OAuth 2.0 authorization for third-party data integrations
Contributed to the Jurnal.id Developer Center, enabling external companies to integrate their accounting data into the platform
